message:
test(membrane): add bandit UCB cache cadence and per-family isolation tests

Two new tests for the constrained bandit router:
- cached_profile_does_not_change_before_recompute_boundary: verify that
  the UCB cached profile stays frozen until the 64-pull cadence boundary,
  even when intermediate observations strongly favor a different arm
- ucb_cache_isolated_per_family: verify that per-family UCB caches are
  independent — touching one family's cadence boundary does not affect
  another family's conservative default cache

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
